name: research-default
description: Suggested policy preset for the research-agent starter. Tight cap because data API calls are typically cents — most prompts should never approach the cap.
notes: $5/24h cap is intentionally tight — research-agent makes many small per-call payments to data APIs.
Approval threshold of $0.50 means anything bulk-priced gets a human-in-the-loop pause.
Set approval_required=false in the dashboard if you trust the agent to research within the cap unsupervised.
Allowlisted services (gates which registered providers the agent may pay) are managed in the Canopy dashboard.
